title: Two years in: the Cryptool platform is live
content_html:
Two years of development, and the platform is live.

Sign-up is open at cryptool.io. New users can create an account, explore what is there, and start onboarding friends and family through the referral programme from day one.

The first release is the foundation, not the finish line. More modules ship over the coming weeks and months, starting with the first Private Round investment opportunity and the public open of the Raise module.

To everyone who carried the project this far: this is your milestone too.
author: Cryptool
